title: Secrets in Glass and Snow
synopsis: When Nimbus, a fluffy cloud being, promises to help solve the mystery of missing snowflakes inside a snow globe world, she must follow clues through five magical locations to discover what's really happening to the precious snow.

pages.text: The snowflakes were disappearing one by one, and Nimbus could see exactly where each one used to be. She drifted above the tiny cobblestone square in the center of the snow globe world, her soft white cotton-like body catching the dim light that filtered through the curved glass walls. Her tiny blue-sky eyes studied the ground carefully. There, near the fountain - a perfect snowflake-shaped hole in the snow. And there, by the lamppost - another empty space where a six-pointed crystal should have been. 'I promise I'll find out what's happening to our snow,' Nimbus whispered to herself, her rainbow ribbon trailing behind her as she floated lower. But as she looked around at all the missing spots, she realized this mystery was bigger than she had thought.

illustration.description: The center square of a miniature snow globe world shown from a magnifying glass perspective. Nimbus, a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind, hovers above cobblestones. The scene uses detailed hidden objects style with visual clues everywhere: perfect snowflake-shaped holes in the snow, tiny footprints leading in different directions, missing snowflake outlines on lamp posts, a small fountain with strange symbols, scattered small objects like buttons and keys, and a busy organized composition showing the intricate details of this impossibly small world.
illustration.alt: A fluffy white cloud creature with blue eyes investigates missing snowflake shapes in a tiny cobblestone square inside a snow globe

pages.text: Nimbus followed a trail of tiny silver sparkles down the narrow Workshop Alley, where all the smallest inventors lived and worked. Her rainbow ribbon fluttered as she peered through miniature windows, looking for clues. Inside Tilda the Thimble-maker's shop, she spotted something strange - a pile of broken snowflake pieces on the workbench, and next to them, a collection of tiny tools she had never seen before. 'Those look like snowflake-building tools,' Nimbus thought, pressing her soft cotton body closer to the glass. But why would someone need to build snowflakes when they fell naturally from the sky? She noticed more silver sparkles leading deeper into the alley, and strange scratching sounds coming from behind the clock repair shop.

illustration.description: A cluttered workshop alley scene inside the snow globe world, viewed through detailed magnifying glass perspective. Nimbus, a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind, floats past tiny shop windows. The detailed hidden objects composition shows numerous visual clues: broken snowflake pieces scattered on workbenches, unusual tiny tools, silver sparkle trails on the ground, many small objects like gears and springs, miniature signs, and various inventor's materials organized in a busy scene throughout the narrow alley.
illustration.alt: A cloud creature with a rainbow ribbon investigates tiny workshop windows filled with broken snowflake pieces and mysterious tools

pages.text: The ice on the Frozen Pond told a story, and Nimbus read it like a book written in scratches and marks. She drifted across the surface, her tiny blue-sky eyes tracing patterns that definitely weren't made by ice skaters. Someone had been scraping snowflakes right off the ice and collecting them in something - she could see the drag marks leading to the edge of the pond. 'But snowflakes melt when you touch them,' Nimbus puzzled, her soft white body hovering just above the suspicious scratches. Unless someone had invented a way to keep them frozen solid. She noticed a trail of those silver sparkles again, and this time they led toward the Old Mill, along with tiny wheel tracks in the snow.

illustration.description: The frozen pond scene inside the snow globe shows ice covered in mysterious scratch marks and patterns. Nimbus, a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind, hovers over the ice surface. The detailed hidden objects style reveals many visual clues: strange scraping patterns in the ice, tiny wheel tracks in surrounding snow, silver sparkle trails, drag marks leading to the pond's edge, scattered small objects like fragments of ice crystals, and a cluttered environment showing the magnifying glass perspective of this miniature world.
illustration.alt: A fluffy cloud being investigates mysterious scratch patterns and wheel tracks around a frozen pond in a snow globe world

pages.text: Inside the Old Mill, Nimbus discovered the most amazing sight she had ever seen. The miller wasn't grinding grain at all - he was carefully grinding collected snowflakes into the finest, most sparkly snow powder, and then using a wonderful machine to press it back into new, even more beautiful snowflakes. 'He's been fixing all the broken ones and making the old ones prettier!' Nimbus realized, watching her rainbow ribbon dance in the cool air from the mill wheel. Tables covered with half-finished snowflakes stretched across the room, each one more intricate than the last. But something worried her - there were far more broken snowflakes here than she had seen missing from around the globe. Where were all these damaged ones coming from?

illustration.description: The interior of an old mill converted into a snowflake workshop, shown in detailed hidden objects style. Nimbus, a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind, floats among tables covered with snowflake parts. The busy organized composition includes: a snowflake-making machine, grinding wheels, tables full of half-finished snowflakes, tiny tools everywhere, piles of snow powder, intricate snowflake patterns, many small objects scattered throughout, and visual clues about the snowflake reconstruction process, all viewed from a magnifying glass perspective.
illustration.alt: A cloud creature discovers a secret snowflake workshop inside an old mill, with tables full of snowflake-making equipment and half-finished snow crystals

pages.text: At the very edge of their small world, where the ground met the curved glass wall of the snow globe, Nimbus found her answer. The snowflakes weren't disappearing - they were getting damaged when curious faces pressed too close to the glass, and their warm breath fogged up the surface, melting the delicate crystals near the walls. 'The miller has been collecting the broken ones and making them beautiful again,' Nimbus understood, her soft cotton body glowing with happiness. She had promised to solve the mystery, and now she knew the truth - their snowflakes were being rescued, not stolen. As she watched, the miller carefully placed a batch of newly-perfected snowflakes back around the square, each one more gorgeous than before. The mystery was solved, but more importantly, their snow globe world was being lovingly cared for by someone who understood how precious each tiny crystal really was.

illustration.description: The edge of the snow globe world where the miniature landscape meets the curved glass wall. Nimbus, a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind, floats near the glass barrier. The detailed hidden objects composition shows: fog marks on the inner glass surface, tiny melted snowflake puddles, the miller in the distance placing fresh snowflakes, trails of evidence leading back toward the center, many small clues scattered throughout including water droplets, repair tools, and various tiny objects that tell the story of snowflake rescue and restoration, all in a cluttered but organized search-and-find style scene.
illustration.alt: A fluffy cloud being solves the mystery at the glass wall of a snow globe, discovering how damaged snowflakes are being rescued and restored

coverPrompt.description: A snow globe sits on a wooden surface, and through its curved glass we can see Nimbus - a fluffy cloud being with soft white cotton-like body, tiny blue-sky eyes, and a rainbow ribbon trailing behind - floating above a tiny village. The scene uses detailed hidden objects style with visual clues scattered throughout: tiny footprints in the snow, missing snowflake shapes on buildings, a magnifying glass effect showing the intricate details inside the globe, and various small mysterious objects tucked into corners of the miniature world.
coverPrompt.alt: A magical snow globe containing a fluffy white cloud creature with blue eyes and a rainbow ribbon, surrounded by mysterious clues in a tiny village scene

questions.question: What was really happening to the missing snowflakes?
choices: They were melting from warm breath and being repaired
questions.explanation: The miller was collecting damaged snowflakes and fixing them to make them even more beautiful!

questions.question: What did Nimbus notice in the Workshop Alley?
choices: Broken snowflake pieces and special tools
questions.explanation: Nimbus saw broken snowflake pieces on the workbench and tiny tools for building snowflakes.

questions.question: Where did Nimbus find the most important clue?
questions.explanation: At the glass wall, Nimbus discovered that warm breath from outside was damaging the snowflakes.

questions.question: What was the miller doing in the Old Mill?
choices: Making new snowflakes from broken ones
questions.explanation: The miller was grinding broken snowflakes into powder and making them into new, more beautiful snowflakes.

questions.question: What promise did Nimbus make?
choices: To solve the mystery of the missing snowflakes
questions.explanation: Nimbus promised to find out what was happening to the disappearing snowflakes in their snow globe world.
